risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion mismatch between Al 7075 and CFRP materials.
risk.mit: Use a thermal interface material between Al 7075 and CFRP to manage thermal expansion.

risk.desc: Risk of harness damage during assembly due to tight routing channels.
risk.mit: Increase the bend radius and add strain relief features in harness routing channels.

risk.desc: Risk of mis-mating due to connector keying errors.
risk.mit: Conduct thorough testing and inspection of connector keying during assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of over-tightening fasteners leading to damage.
risk.mit: Implement torque control measures during assembly to prevent over-tightening.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal cycling causing fatigue in structural joints.
risk.mit: Design joints with sufficient clearance and use high-temperature materials to mitigate fatigue.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Inter-board harness routing, connectors, assembly datums, connection types and load-path closure

physics_paths.description: Power and data routing from EPS board to OBC board
Structural load path from OBC board to assembly datum pads
Access for inspection and maintenance

manufacturing_strategy.support: orientation: vertical, inspection: visual and CMM

verification_focus.description: Verify harness routing channels are correctly formed
Ensure connectors are keyed correctly and prevent mis-mating
Check datum faces are flat and perpendicular
